title: ExecutionLocation
description: A class to specify execution location terms of a Security Agreement.

executionLocation.description: The execution location of the agreement.

otherLanguage.description: Bespoke execution location language to be included when specified.

dutyPayerLanguage.description: Bespoke terms specific to the payment of documentary duty.

dutyPaymentDate.description: The date that documentary duty will be paid.

dutyPaymentLanguage.description: Bespoke terms specific to the date that documentary duty will be paid.
